title: Leandra cornoides
taxonomy: Leandra cornoides is classified within the family Melastomataceae. This family is a part of the order Myrtales. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in the treatment of various ailments such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues.
